not_available: official VAE rollout state-latent trajectory dataset
real robot data for deployment tasks

interpretation.why_not_complete: This is a real training run with paper-sized VAE and diffusion architectures on all requested public G1 LAFAN1 motions available locally. It is still not an exact paper reproduction because the official teacher-policy DAgger rollouts and VAE rollout state-latent dataset are not public in the local bundle.

scope: paper-sized conditional VAE and Transformer diffusion training on public retargeted LAFAN1 G1 motions
